backend/main.mo: Main actor for the marketplace backend defining types (Product, Order, Store, etc.) and state maps, with mixins for storage, authorization, and user approval, plus Stripe and HTTP outcall integrations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by adding an empty `variants` array to all existing Product records in both the `products` and `storeProducts` maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three variant-related features (UI display, TypeScript types, React Query hooks) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (including auctions and trade offers) and wraps pages in a shared Header/Footer layout with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Displays a list of vendor approval requests with pending/approved/rejected status badges, and allows admins to approve or reject vendors via mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel that lists all auctions in a sortable table and provides cancel/finalize actions for each auction using query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel that displays all orders in a filterable table by status and allows inline status updates via a select dropdown.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel for managing vendor payouts with status updates, and a commission rate editor that reads and writes the platform commission percentage.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small presentational component that renders a color-coded badge for a given PayoutStatus value.
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form that allows an admin to assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user identified by their Principal ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel that lists all trade offers in a sortable table and allows cancellation of individual offers via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Displays a single auction as a card with title, status badge, pricing, a live countdown timer, and a navigation button to the auction detail page.
Reusable countdown component that calculates and displays time remaining until an auction ends, supporting both compact (inline) and full (block) display modes.
Renders a responsive grid of AuctionCard components with loading skeleton placeholders and an empty-state message.
Small badge component that displays an auction's status (active, ended, canceled) with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: Form component for placing a bid on an active auction, enforcing a minimum bid amount and showing success/error toasts via the usePlaceBid mutation.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a scrollable, time-sorted list of past bids for an auction, showing bidder address, amount, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on sign-out and showing a loading spinner during authentication.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to complete profile setup before accessing the marketplace.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: Popover cart icon in the navbar that shows item count and a preview list of cart items with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, quantity, line total, and a remove button using the useRemoveFromCart mutation.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Order summary panel that calculates and displays the cart subtotal and a checkout button, accepting items and resolved product data as props.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Displays a checkout order review panel showing cart items with images/prices, shipping address, subtotal, and a Stripe payment button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: Renders a controlled shipping address form with fields for street, city, state, zip, and country, with a skip mode for digital-only orders.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand logo, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart dropdown, and a user profile dropdown that adapts based on authentication, vendor approval, and admin status.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Renders a color-coded badge for an order status value (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled).
Displays a horizontal step timeline of order stages (pending → delivered) with visual indicators for completed, current, future, and canceled states.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Renders a single product card with image, title, type badge, description, optional variant selector, price, stock status, and an add-to-cart button with toast feedback.
Displays a responsive grid of ProductCard components, showing skeleton placeholders while loading and an empty-state message when no products exist.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Provides keyword search, category, product type, and sort-order filter controls for the product listing, with a reset button when any filter is active.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: Form that lets a user send a counter trade offer by specifying a cash adjustment and optional note, swapping the original offer's offered/requested items.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: Form for creating a new trade offer with dynamic lists of offered and requested items, a cash adjustment, a note, and a target principal field.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Displays a single trade offer's details (items, cash adjustment, note, status) and provides accept, reject, cancel, or counter actions based on perspective and offer status.
Renders a vertical list of TradeOfferCard components with loading skeletons and an empty-state message, forwarding the perspective and counter-offer callback to each card.
Standalone badge component that maps a trade offer status string to a color-coded styled Badge for display.
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: A form component for vendors to create a new auction, collecting title, product ID, description, starting price, reserve price, and end time, then submitting via the useCreateAuction mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: A reusable form component for creating or editing a vendor product, pre-populating fields when an existing product is provided and submitting via useCreateProduct or useUpdateProduct mutations.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Displays a vendor's product list with options to add, edit, or delete products, using a dialog to host ProductForm and filtering all products by vendorId.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreForm: A modal dialog for creating or editing a vendor store, with fields for name, description, and contact info, submitting via useCreateStore or useUpdateStore mutations.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreList: Manages a vendor's list of stores (up to a maximum of 5), allowing creation, editing, and active/inactive toggling of stores, with loading skeletons and a tooltip when the store limit is reached.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreProd: A full CRUD UI component for managing products within a specific store, supporting add/edit/delete operations with a form that includes product fields and dynamic variant rows.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreSele: A dropdown selector component that fetches and displays the vendor's stores, showing active/inactive status badges and notifying the parent of store selection changes.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions in a list with live countdown timers, bid counts, and cancel controls, plus a collapsible form to create new auctions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Renders a sortable table of vendor transaction history showing order ID, date, item count, gross amount, commission, and net payout with a link to each order's receipt.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows a vendor's payout history with summary cards for total earned and pending amounts, plus a detailed table of individual payouts with status badges.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: A form component that allows vendors to edit their profile fields (name, description, contact) and save changes via the updateVendorProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: A multi-field React form for vendor registration that collects store ID, name, description, contact, and optional logo, then calls createVendorProfile and requestApproval mutations, storing the vendor ID in localStorage on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, roles, approvals, vendor/store management, products, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a luxury fragrance-themed design system with OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus utility classes and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders panels for vendor approvals, role assignment, order management, payout management, auction management, and trade offer management, with access control based on identity and admin role checks.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Displays a single auction's details including countdown timer, bid history, and bid form, with loading skeleton and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Lists all active auctions in a grid layout using the useListActiveAuctions hook.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with item rows and an order summary, handling empty cart and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout page that collects a shipping address then shows an order review before redirecting to a Stripe payment session.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, three feature highlights, and a grid of up to eight featured products sorted by popularity.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's order history sorted by date, with status badges and links to order detail and receipt pages.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Page wrapping the NewTradeOfferForm component, allowing users to propose a new trade offer with a back-navigation link.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays an order confirmation page after a successful order, showing status timeline, order ID, items, and total, with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Renders a printable invoice/receipt page for a specific order, including shipping address, line items, transaction details, and an admin-aware layout.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Shows a payment-cancelled confirmation page, informing the user no charge was made and providing links to return to the cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Handles the Stripe payment success redirect by confirming the payment via mutation, then displaying a success summary and auto-redirecting to the order details page.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders the main product browsing page with search/filter controls and a product grid populated from a filtered query.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Displays the current user's incoming and outgoing trade offers in separate tabs, with a button to create a new trade offer.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Provides the vendor dashboard with store selection, quick stats, store management, product management, payouts, order history, and auctions panels, gated behind approval checks.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor-only page for managing products, gating access behind identity, approval status, and a stored vendor ID before rendering the ProductListManager.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: React page that handles vendor registration flow, showing an access-denied state for unauthenticated users, an approved-vendor redirect, a post-submission confirmation, or the registration form component.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Central TypeScript type definitions mirroring the Motoko backend, covering products, orders, payouts, auctions, trade offers, vendors, and related enums/interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Utility module for Stripe Checkout integration, providing helpers to build success/cancel redirect URLs and parse checkout session responses from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury-themed design system with custom colors (gold, bronze, cream), fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), shadows, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing features, pending feature requests (variants, bundles, wholesaling, ownership transfer), known issues, and architectural notes for the Fragrance.Intl ICP marketplace app.
